audience.description: Python developers who can write functions, collections, files, modules, and tests and now need rigorous object design and maintainable application architecture.
entryKnowledge: Complete Modern Python Foundations or demonstrate equivalent functions, collections, exceptions, modules, typing, and testing skill.
deviceConstraints: Desktop or tablet with a modern browser and optional local Python 3.14 type-checking environment
accessibilityAssumptions: Learners may use keyboard navigation, zoom, screen readers, voice input, or reduced motion.

placementEvidence: Complete Modern Python Foundations or pass a placement build covering functions, collections, exceptions, modules, typing, files, and tests.
completionEvidence: Complete and defend all four typed stakeholder projects against their acceptance constraints and rubrics.
Pass the cumulative object-oriented Python performance examination at or above 87 percent in changed cases.

includes: Composition, inheritance, protocols, generics, patterns, and refactoring
Four cumulative typed and tested domain projects

sources.title: Python Data Model Reference
sources.scope: Controls object identity, classes, descriptors, method binding, special methods, MRO, and runtime behavior.

sources.title: Python Tutorial Classes
sources.scope: Controls introductory class, instance, namespace, inheritance, iterator, and generator explanations.

sources.title: Descriptor Guide
sources.scope: Controls descriptor precedence, properties, functions, methods, and managed attribute implementation.

sources.title: Dataclasses Documentation
sources.scope: Controls generated methods, fields, factories, frozen behavior, slots, and post-initialization.

sources.title: Typing Documentation
sources.scope: Controls protocols, generics, class object types, Self, callable typing, annotation introspection, and deprecations.

competencies.statement: Reason about object identity, type, value, mutability, equality, and lifetime in an object-oriented design.
misconceptions: Two objects with equal values are always the same object.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reason about object identity, type, value, mutability, equality, and lifetime in an object-oriented design.

competencies.statement: Define classes and create instances while distinguishing class objects from the instances they construct.
misconceptions: A class is only a static template and is not itself a runtime object.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define classes and create instances while distinguishing class objects from the instances they construct.

competencies.statement: Trace class, instance, module, and local namespaces during attribute lookup and assignment.
misconceptions: Assigning an instance attribute changes the class attribute for every instance.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Trace class, instance, module, and local namespaces during attribute lookup and assignment.

competencies.statement: Explain function descriptors, bound methods, self, cls, and how attribute access supplies the receiver.
misconceptions: Python copies every method into each instance when it is created.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Explain function descriptors, bound methods, self, cls, and how attribute access supplies the receiver.

competencies.statement: Choose instance, class, and static methods from ownership of state and alternate-constructor needs.
misconceptions: Static methods are faster instance methods and should replace them when self is unused.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose instance, class, and static methods from ownership of state and alternate-constructor needs.

competencies.statement: Distinguish object allocation in __new__ from initialization in __init__ and override either only for justified behavior.
misconceptions: The return value of __init__ becomes the newly created instance.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish object allocation in __new__ from initialization in __init__ and override either only for justified behavior.

competencies.statement: Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
misconceptions: Partially initialized objects are acceptable when later methods fill required fields.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.

competencies.statement: Implement classmethod alternate constructors that normalize external representations through one invariant path.
misconceptions: Each alternate constructor should duplicate initialization so formats stay independent.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement classmethod alternate constructors that normalize external representations through one invariant path.

competencies.statement: Use dataclass fields, defaults, factories, ordering, frozen behavior, and post-init validation deliberately.
misconceptions: A frozen dataclass makes every referenced nested object immutable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use dataclass fields, defaults, factories, ordering, frozen behavior, and post-init validation deliberately.

competencies.statement: Use slots only after measuring memory or attribute-control needs and accounting for inheritance and weak references.
misconceptions: Slots are a universal performance optimization for every class.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use slots only after measuring memory or attribute-control needs and accounting for inheritance and weak references.

competencies.statement: Design immutable value objects with coherent equality, hashing, normalization, and validation semantics.
misconceptions: Any object with an equals method is automatically safe as a dictionary key.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design immutable value objects with coherent equality, hashing, normalization, and validation semantics.

competencies.statement: Use public APIs, leading-underscore conventions, and name mangling according to collaboration and subclass risks.
misconceptions: Double-underscore names provide security and make data inaccessible.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use public APIs, leading-underscore conventions, and name mangling according to collaboration and subclass risks.

competencies.statement: Use properties to preserve attribute-like access when validation, computation, compatibility, or read-only behavior is needed.
misconceptions: Every attribute should have a getter and setter property for encapsulation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use properties to preserve attribute-like access when validation, computation, compatibility, or read-only behavior is needed.

competencies.statement: Keep validation and invariants consistent across constructor, property setter, methods, deserialization, and copying paths.
misconceptions: Validation in one setter guarantees no other path can violate the object.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep validation and invariants consistent across constructor, property setter, methods, deserialization, and copying paths.

competencies.statement: Explain __get__, __set__, __delete__, __set_name__, and data-versus-non-data descriptor precedence.
misconceptions: Properties are special syntax unrelated to Python descriptors.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Explain __get__, __set__, __delete__, __set_name__, and data-versus-non-data descriptor precedence.

competencies.statement: Build a descriptor only when repeated managed-attribute behavior outweighs simpler property or composition designs.
misconceptions: Descriptors are the clearest solution for any validation shared by two classes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build a descriptor only when repeated managed-attribute behavior outweighs simpler property or composition designs.

competencies.statement: Use immutability, snapshots, read-only views, and defensive copies according to ownership and performance needs.
misconceptions: Returning a tuple always prevents callers from mutating the underlying nested state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use immutability, snapshots, read-only views, and defensive copies according to ownership and performance needs.

competencies.statement: Model has-a relationships with explicit ownership, lifetime, and mutation responsibilities.
misconceptions: Composition means the parent must always create and destroy every collaborator.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model has-a relationships with explicit ownership, lifetime, and mutation responsibilities.

competencies.statement: Delegate behavior through a narrow collaborator API without leaking its complete representation.
misconceptions: Delegation is unnecessary indirection whenever one method calls another object.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Delegate behavior through a narrow collaborator API without leaking its complete representation.

competencies.statement: Supply time, storage, messaging, and policy dependencies explicitly so behavior is replaceable and testable.
misconceptions: Dependency injection requires a framework or global service container.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Supply time, storage, messaging, and policy dependencies explicitly so behavior is replaceable and testable.

competencies.statement: Evaluate coupling, cohesion, fan-in, change reasons, and information hiding when assigning class responsibilities.
misconceptions: More small classes always means lower coupling and higher cohesion.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate coupling, cohesion, fan-in, change reasons, and information hiding when assigning class responsibilities.

competencies.statement: Distinguish shared aggregation from owned composition and document collaborator lifecycle and failure behavior.
misconceptions: Every has-a relationship has identical ownership and lifecycle semantics.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish shared aggregation from owned composition and document collaborator lifecycle and failure behavior.

competencies.statement: Move decisions toward objects that own relevant information without creating command-heavy anemic or god objects.
misconceptions: Tell-dont-ask forbids reading any attribute or query result from another object.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Move decisions toward objects that own relevant information without creating command-heavy anemic or god objects.

competencies.statement: Use inheritance when a subtype preserves the semantic contract and reusable implementation of its base type.
misconceptions: Code reuse alone is sufficient reason to create a subclass.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use inheritance when a subtype preserves the semantic contract and reusable implementation of its base type.

competencies.statement: Override methods while preserving input, output, state, exception, and side-effect expectations of callers.
misconceptions: A subtype may narrow accepted inputs because its implementation is more specific.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Override methods while preserving input, output, state, exception, and side-effect expectations of callers.

competencies.statement: Use zero-argument super for cooperative method chains and pass compatible arguments through participating classes.
misconceptions: Super always calls the immediate parent named in the class definition.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use zero-argument super for cooperative method chains and pass compatible arguments through participating classes.

competencies.statement: Predict C3 method resolution order and diagnose inconsistent or surprising multiple-inheritance graphs.
misconceptions: Python searches direct parents left to right without considering their ancestors together.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Predict C3 method resolution order and diagnose inconsistent or surprising multiple-inheritance graphs.

competencies.statement: Design narrow stateless or low-state mixins with explicit requirements instead of partial domain base classes.
misconceptions: A mixin can assume any attribute exists because subclasses will provide it.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design narrow stateless or low-state mixins with explicit requirements instead of partial domain base classes.

competencies.statement: Choose composition, protocols, delegation, or inheritance by variability, substitutability, ownership, and change cost.
misconceptions: Inheritance is more object-oriented than composition.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose composition, protocols, delegation, or inheritance by variability, substitutability, ownership, and change cost.

competencies.statement: Use behavior-based polymorphism where callers depend on supported operations rather than concrete class identity.
misconceptions: Duck typing means errors should be ignored until production calls fail.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use behavior-based polymorphism where callers depend on supported operations rather than concrete class identity.

competencies.statement: Define abstract base classes with required operations and optional shared behavior when nominal hierarchy is justified.
misconceptions: An abstract method cannot contain any reusable implementation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define abstract base classes with required operations and optional shared behavior when nominal hierarchy is justified.

competencies.statement: Define structural Protocol roles that match consumer needs and support static checking without forced inheritance.
misconceptions: Every class satisfying a Protocol must explicitly inherit from it.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define structural Protocol roles that match consumer needs and support static checking without forced inheritance.

competencies.statement: Use isinstance, issubclass, runtime-checkable protocols, and explicit capability checks only at justified boundaries.
misconceptions: Runtime type checks are always safer than attempting the supported operation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use isinstance, issubclass, runtime-checkable protocols, and explicit capability checks only at justified boundaries.

competencies.statement: Evaluate subtypes against preconditions, postconditions, invariants, exceptions, and semantic expectations.
misconceptions: Matching method names and annotations proves Liskov substitutability.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate subtypes against preconditions, postconditions, invariants, exceptions, and semantic expectations.

competencies.statement: Use null objects or strategies when they preserve a real role contract better than repeated None branching.
misconceptions: A null object should silently swallow every operation and failure.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use null objects or strategies when they preserve a real role contract better than repeated None branching.

competencies.statement: Implement __repr__ for unambiguous developer evidence and __str__ for user-facing text without leaking secrets.
misconceptions: Repr and str should always return the same formatted text.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement __repr__ for unambiguous developer evidence and __str__ for user-facing text without leaking secrets.

competencies.statement: Implement equality and ordering with NotImplemented, compatible types, and a coherent domain comparison key.
misconceptions: Returning False is always correct when equality sees an unknown type.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement equality and ordering with NotImplemented, compatible types, and a coherent domain comparison key.

competencies.statement: Implement hashing only for stable equality state and preserve the rule that equal objects have equal hashes.
misconceptions: Adding __hash__ to a mutable object makes it safe as a set member.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement hashing only for stable equality state and preserve the rule that equal objects have equal hashes.

competencies.statement: Overload arithmetic or other operators only when algebraic meaning, result types, and reverse operations are unsurprising.
misconceptions: Any domain method becomes more Pythonic when exposed through an operator.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Overload arithmetic or other operators only when algebraic meaning, result types, and reverse operations are unsurprising.

competencies.statement: Implement length, iteration, membership, indexing, and containment protocols with standard exception and performance behavior.
misconceptions: Defining __getitem__ requires supporting every kind of slice and negative index.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement length, iteration, membership, indexing, and containment protocols with standard exception and performance behavior.

competencies.statement: Implement context-manager or callable protocols when object lifetime or invocation genuinely matches those language roles.
misconceptions: Making an object callable is equivalent to giving it a run method with no design tradeoff.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement context-manager or callable protocols when object lifetime or invocation genuinely matches those language roles.

competencies.statement: Use Python 3.14 annotation syntax, built-in generics, unions, aliases, and forward references consistently.
misconceptions: Annotations are eagerly evaluated and runtime-enforced in every Python 3.14 program.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use Python 3.14 annotation syntax, built-in generics, unions, aliases, and forward references consistently.

competencies.statement: Define generic classes and functions whose type parameters express a real input-output relationship.
misconceptions: Adding a type parameter automatically makes an implementation type safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define generic classes and functions whose type parameters express a real input-output relationship.

competencies.statement: Reason about covariance, contravariance, invariance, mutation, and substitutability in generic APIs.
misconceptions: A container of subtypes can always replace a container of base types.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reason about covariance, contravariance, invariance, mutation, and substitutability in generic APIs.

competencies.statement: Use Self and type of class annotations for fluent APIs, alternate constructors, and class factories.
misconceptions: An annotation of C and type of C describe the same runtime value.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use Self and type of class annotations for fluent APIs, alternate constructors, and class factories.

competencies.statement: Type callback and decorator signatures with callable protocols, ParamSpec, and return type parameters when needed.
misconceptions: Callable ellipsis preserves complete parameter type safety.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Type callback and decorator signatures with callable protocols, ParamSpec, and return type parameters when needed.

competencies.statement: Inspect annotations with supported APIs while accounting for lazy evaluation, forward references, and arbitrary-code risk.
misconceptions: Reading __annotations__ directly is always safe and returns fully evaluated values.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inspect annotations with supported APIs while accounting for lazy evaluation, forward references, and arbitrary-code risk.

competencies.statement: Model allowed states and transitions explicitly so every method preserves domain invariants.
misconceptions: Boolean flags remain clearer than a state model as transitions grow.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model allowed states and transitions explicitly so every method preserves domain invariants.

competencies.statement: Define a small domain error hierarchy that communicates recoverable business failures without leaking infrastructure details.
misconceptions: Every lower-level exception should pass unchanged through the domain API.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define a small domain error hierarchy that communicates recoverable business failures without leaking infrastructure details.

competencies.statement: Translate storage, network, and parsing failures at ownership boundaries while preserving causes for operators.
misconceptions: Exception translation should suppress the original cause to keep messages simple.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Translate storage, network, and parsing failures at ownership boundaries while preserving causes for operators.

competencies.statement: Make acquisition, commit, rollback, close, and retry responsibilities explicit across collaborating objects.
misconceptions: Garbage collection provides deterministic release for every external resource.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Make acquisition, commit, rollback, close, and retry responsibilities explicit across collaborating objects.

competencies.statement: Group state changes into atomic application operations with clear success, rollback, and idempotency behavior.
misconceptions: A transaction is only a database feature and has no object-design implications.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Group state changes into atomic application operations with clear success, rollback, and idempotency behavior.

competencies.statement: Assign responsibilities by cohesive reason to change rather than forcing one method or one field per class.
misconceptions: Single responsibility means every class contains exactly one method.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Assign responsibilities by cohesive reason to change rather than forcing one method or one field per class.

competencies.statement: Create extension points around observed stable variation without prebuilding speculative plugin systems.
misconceptions: Open-closed design requires inheritance for every future feature.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create extension points around observed stable variation without prebuilding speculative plugin systems.

competencies.statement: Expose small client-specific roles so consumers do not depend on operations they cannot or should not use.
misconceptions: Many tiny interfaces always reduce complexity regardless of consumers.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Expose small client-specific roles so consumers do not depend on operations they cannot or should not use.

competencies.statement: Make high-level policy depend on stable roles while concrete infrastructure implements those boundaries.
misconceptions: Dependency inversion means every class needs an interface and dependency container.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Make high-level policy depend on stable roles while concrete infrastructure implements those boundaries.

competencies.statement: Use smells such as feature envy, shotgun surgery, long parameter lists, and god objects as investigation prompts.
misconceptions: A named code smell proves a specific refactoring is required.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use smells such as feature envy, shotgun surgery, long parameter lists, and god objects as investigation prompts.

competencies.statement: Refactor through characterization tests, small transformations, reviewable diffs, and unchanged external behavior.
misconceptions: A refactor may change behavior as long as the architecture becomes cleaner.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Refactor through characterization tests, small transformations, reviewable diffs, and unchanged external behavior.

competencies.statement: Use strategy objects or callables when an algorithm varies independently and must be selected or tested explicitly.
misconceptions: Strategy requires one subclass for every branch even when functions suffice.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use strategy objects or callables when an algorithm varies independently and must be selected or tested explicitly.

competencies.statement: Use factory functions or objects when construction choice, configuration, validation, or lifecycle must be centralized.
misconceptions: Every constructor call should be hidden behind an abstract factory.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use factory functions or objects when construction choice, configuration, validation, or lifecycle must be centralized.

competencies.statement: Wrap an incompatible external API behind the small role the application actually needs.
misconceptions: An adapter should expose every feature of the wrapped library.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Wrap an incompatible external API behind the small role the application actually needs.

competencies.statement: Publish domain events to decouple secondary reactions while defining ordering, failure, duplication, and delivery semantics.
misconceptions: Observer callbacks automatically run reliably and in parallel.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Publish domain events to decouple secondary reactions while defining ordering, failure, duplication, and delivery semantics.

competencies.statement: Represent operations as command values when queuing, logging, undo, authorization, or scheduling justifies it.
misconceptions: Turning each method call into a command always improves testability.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Represent operations as command values when queuing, logging, undo, authorization, or scheduling justifies it.

competencies.statement: Use a repository boundary when domain collection semantics and persistence replacement justify abstraction.
misconceptions: A repository is merely a class that copies every database method.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use a repository boundary when domain collection semantics and persistence replacement justify abstraction.

competencies.statement: Use state objects when behavior varies substantially by state and explicit transition logic outgrows simpler representations.
misconceptions: The State pattern is required whenever an object has more than one Boolean flag.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use state objects when behavior varies substantially by state and explicit transition logic outgrows simpler representations.

competencies.statement: Test constructor and mutation invariants across valid boundaries, invalid inputs, and unchanged-state failures.
misconceptions: One happy-path constructor test proves an object remains valid after mutations.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test constructor and mutation invariants across valid boundaries, invalid inputs, and unchanged-state failures.

competencies.statement: Test object collaboration through outcomes and role boundaries without over-specifying internal call order.
misconceptions: Verifying every mock call makes collaboration tests robust to refactoring.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test object collaboration through outcomes and role boundaries without over-specifying internal call order.

competencies.statement: Choose real objects, fakes, stubs, spies, or mocks based on speed, determinism, behavior fidelity, and diagnostic value.
misconceptions: Mocks are always more isolated and therefore preferable to fakes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose real objects, fakes, stubs, spies, or mocks based on speed, determinism, behavior fidelity, and diagnostic value.

competencies.statement: Run one reusable behavior contract against every protocol, repository, or strategy implementation.
misconceptions: Static type checking proves all implementations share runtime semantics.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run one reusable behavior contract against every protocol, repository, or strategy implementation.

competencies.statement: Generate varied values and operation sequences to test invariants when examples cannot cover the state space.
misconceptions: Random generated tests need no reproducible seeds or minimized failures.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Generate varied values and operation sequences to test invariants when examples cannot cover the state space.

competencies.statement: Verify round-trip, version, missing-field, unknown-field, and invalid-data behavior at serialization boundaries.
misconceptions: A successful round trip proves backward and forward compatibility.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Verify round-trip, version, missing-field, unknown-field, and invalid-data behavior at serialization boundaries.

competencies.statement: Separate domain rules, application orchestration, infrastructure adapters, and user interface concerns with explicit dependencies.
misconceptions: Layered architecture requires each layer to live in a separate deployed service.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate domain rules, application orchestration, infrastructure adapters, and user interface concerns with explicit dependencies.

competencies.statement: Use domain services only for cohesive rules that do not naturally belong to one entity or value object.
misconceptions: Any operation involving two objects belongs in a domain service.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use domain services only for cohesive rules that do not naturally belong to one entity or value object.

competencies.statement: Version persisted representations and migrate data without coupling domain objects directly to historical storage schemas.
misconceptions: Pickling domain objects is a stable long-term storage and migration format.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Version persisted representations and migrate data without coupling domain objects directly to historical storage schemas.

competencies.statement: Design plugin discovery, capability contracts, isolation, configuration, and failure behavior around a narrow extension surface.
misconceptions: Loading arbitrary plugin code is safe when it implements the expected Protocol.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design plugin discovery, capability contracts, isolation, configuration, and failure behavior around a narrow extension surface.

competencies.statement: Record context, options, consequences, and reversal conditions for major object and dependency decisions.
misconceptions: Architecture decisions are self-evident from class diagrams and need no written context.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record context, options, consequences, and reversal conditions for major object and dependency decisions.

competencies.statement: Defend substitutability, invariants, typing, tests, persistence, failures, security, and maintainability with changed-case evidence.
misconceptions: A class count and UML diagram demonstrate object-oriented mastery.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend substitutability, invariants, typing, tests, persistence, failures, security, and maintainability with changed-case evidence.
